title: The Rise and Persistence of Illegal Crops: Evidence from a Naive Policy Announcement

original_result.source: Table 1, Column 1 (suit_announce on coca_area_grid, continuous treatment). Binarized at median suitability for replication.

notes: Coca production in Colombia. Treatment = policy announcement (2014) x coca suitability. Original paper uses continuous treatment (suitability x announcement). For replication, binarized at median suitability: high-suitability municipalities (treated, gvar=2014) vs low-suitability (control, gvar=0). Single treatment date. SA disabled (single cohort). Bacon N/A (single timing = 100% TvU). HonestDiD FIXED: original batch wrongly reported CS-NT SE=NA; only reference period (t=-1) has SE=NA (normal). CS-NT HonestDiD now uses diagonal VCOV (clustered SEs from aggte). Single cohort so CS-NT ~ TWFE mechanically. First: TWFE=0.25, CS=0. Avg: TWFE=1.25, CS=1.50.
